text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
You know, I really think they're going<n>to cancel
the BNW concert...

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text:
What?! But we came all the way here<n>just to see
them! We can't give up<n>yet! Come on, let's just
wait a little<n>longer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I head over to the mall on my day off<n>to enjoy
some performances going on<n>there, but when I
arrive, the crowd<n>seems worked up in a bad
way.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, trainer sighted! Nice timing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I bet you're curious about what's<n>going on too,
right? Let's scramble<n>together and find out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun pulls me into the<n>center of the
chaos, where Biwa<n>Hayahide is standing with a
worried<n>expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But if we cancel the concert,<n>everyone who came
to watch us will<n>be so disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know I can't carry the show by<n>myself, but
maybe I can buy some<n>time until Taishin and
Ticket arrive,<n>and—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh gosh, what's wrong, Hayahide?<n>You look like
you're about to send out<n>a distress call!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't expecting to see you two<n>here. I'm
sorry you have to see me in<n>such a state, but the
truth is...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Tickezo and Taishin won't<n>make it?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They said their train's stopped.<n>Thankfully, I
decided to come early to<n>make sure everything
was all right.<n>But still...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is supposed to be a BNW<n>concert, and the
set list was decided<n>with all three of us in mind.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's not possible to make it work onmy own. Sigh... I can't believewe'll have to cancel everything afterall that preparation.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Hayahide? How about if I act as<n>your
wingman?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it'd be a huge shame to let so<n>many
people down! Especially on a<n>weekend!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanna do something for them, and<n>they could
all use a present right now!
choice_data_list:
Would this be another of your "just-because"
presents?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The word "present" reminds me of<n>when
Mayano Top Gun gave Oguri<n>Cap a gift.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a little "just-because"<n>present! From me
to you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You almost got it, but nope! Thisis gonna be a"slightly-special-because-it's-a wonderful-weekend" present!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My dad gives out more than one kind<n>of gift, you
know. He has presents for<n>sunny days and
secret gifts for my<n>mom, and all sorts of other
presents<n>too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I want to turn this disappointing day<n>into a
spectacular gift for everyone!
choice_data_list: You're still short one person though.
You're still short one person though.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's okay! If you join us, then<n>we'll have just
the right number of<n>people!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're a Tracen trainer, aren't you?<n>That means
you should be able to sing<n>all our concert songs!
♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not exactly jumping for joy at<n>the prospect
of performing in front of<n>everyone, but I have no
choice. I steel<n>myself and step onto the stage.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Right now, Taishin and Ticket are<n>doing their best
to make it here.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So until they get here, we'll be<n>singing together,
everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This is a special present for you all on<n>this
sparkly and wonderful weekend!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Man, I came here to see BNW... But I<n>guess this
is better than no concert at<n>all.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(Heehee! ♪ Time to execute a super<n>cute turn in
time with the music!)

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Mayano Top Gun is so<n>energetic—she's
adorable!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(These next steps have gotta look<n>light and airy!
Hehe! Looks like the<n>audience is starting to get
their jets<n>burning!)

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Dang, her moves are awesome! Look<n>how cool
she is!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that? She just glanced<n>this way! My
heart actually skipped a<n>beat! How is she so
sweet and<n>hypnotic at the same time?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(Mayano is incredible. Even in<n>concerts, she's
such a free spirit. I<n>can't lose out to her here!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We're treating you to a one-of-a-kind<n>
arrangement today! So don't even<n>think about
blinking!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: As a treat, I'll give you all a glimpseof both my cute side and my coolside! ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That Mayano Top Gun is really<n>something else... I
should go watch<n>her next race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Hey, everyone'shaving a blast.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! They're doing great! We<n>can't let them
beat us though! C'mon,<n>let's go!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You two made it! We've got a fullsquadron now! Okay, let's reallyget this party going! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
BNW's joint performance with<n>Mayano Top Gun
is a smashing<n>success and ends up becoming
the<n>top trending topic on social media.
